zh.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix de Venables於1232年出生在英國爾時，她的父親Hugh de Venables41歲，母親Alice de Oxton36歲。她於1225年與Roger de Toft在英國英格蘭爾米德列維其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1272年在英國爾金德頓享年41歲。

zh-hans.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英国爾金德頓 姆 赫爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beatrix de Venables于1232年出生在英国爾时，她的父亲Hugh de Venables41岁，母亲Alice de Oxton36岁。她于1225年与Roger de Toft在英国英格兰爾米德列維其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1272年在英国爾金德頓享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix de Venables was born in 1232, in Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 41 and her mother, Alice de Oxton, was 36. She married Roger de Toft in 1225, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1272, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beatrix de Venables est née en 1232, à Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Alice de Oxton, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Roger de Toft en 1225, à Middlewich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1272, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beatrix de Venables 1232 in Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 41 und ihre Mutter Alice de Oxton 36. Sie hat 1225 in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Roger de Toft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1272 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Kinderton, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Venables è nata il nel 1232 nel Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Alice de Oxton, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Roger de Toft nel 1225, nel Middlewich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1272, nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Cheshire, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスチェシュアイア

ja.Kinderton cum Hulme, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン クウム ハルメ
ja.Kinderton, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトン
ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Venablesが1232年にイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは41歳，母Alice de Oxtonは36歳であった。1225年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアミッドルイチでRoger de Toftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1272年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Venables(이)가 1232년 영국 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Oxton(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1225년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 미들루이치에서 Roger de Toft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1272년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beatrix de Venables nasceu em 1232, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Oxton, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger de Toft em 1225, em Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1272, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix de Venables родилась в 1232 г. в местности чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Oxton, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Toft в 1225 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1272 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beatrix de Venables nació en 1232, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Alice de Oxton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Roger de Toft en 1225, en Middlewich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1272, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
